PT Food Station Tjipinang Jaya (Perserod: PT Food Station Tjipinang Jaya (Perseroda) — a Jakarta regional-owned enterprise committed to public information disclosure under Law No. 14 of 2008.

Wujud tata kelola perusahaan yang baik d: A form of good and accountable corporate governance — implementing public information disclosure under Law No. 14 of 2008.
Tiga klasifikasi informasi publik yang d: Three classifications of public information accessible to the public under information disclosure regulations.
Enam tahapan sederhana dari pengajuan hi: Six simple stages from submission to receiving your information.

Bagaimana cara mengajukan permohonan inf: How do I submit a public information request?
Permohonan dapat diajukan secara daring: Requests can be submitted online via the Information Request menu on this portal by filling in the available form, or in person at the PPID office during service hours.
Berapa lama waktu tanggapan atas permoho: How long is the response time for a request?
Sesuai UU No. 14 Tahun 2008, PPID wajib: Under Law No. 14 of 2008, PPID must respond to a request within 10 working days of receipt, extendable by 7 working days if needed.
Apakah layanan informasi publik dikenaka: Is there a fee for public information services?
Layanan informasi publik tidak dipungut: Public information services are free of charge, except for reasonable document copying or delivery costs, which are disclosed upfront.
Apa yang bisa dilakukan jika permohonan: What can I do if a request is denied?
Pemohon dapat mengajukan keberatan secar: Applicants may file a written objection to the PPID's superior via the Objection Filing menu on this portal, within 30 working days of receiving the denial.
Bagaimana cara melacak status permohonan: How do I track the status of a submitted request?
Gunakan menu Cek Status Layanan dan masu: Use the Check Status menu and enter the ticket number received at submission to see progress in real time.
Belum ada daftar informasi yang tersedia: No information is available in this category yet.
Belum ada daftar regulasi yang tersedia: No regulations are available at this time.
Profil Singkat PPID Food Station: Brief Profile of PPID Food Station
Informasi mengenai Pejabat Pengelola Inf: Information about the Information and Documentation Management Officer (PPID) of Food Station.
Layanan dilaksanakan setiap hari kerja (: Services run every working day (Monday to Friday) except national holidays or collective leave.
Pejabat Pengelola Informasi dan Dokument: The Information and Documentation Management Officer (PPID) of PT Food Station Tjipinang Jaya (Perseroda) is the official responsible for managing, documenting, storing, providing, and serving public information within the company. PPID plays a key role in realizing transparency, accountability, and information services that are fast, accurate, and easily accessible to the public.
Melaksanakan pembinaan, pengelolaan, dan: Conducting the guidance, management, and service of information and documentation across all work units of PT Food Station Tjipinang Jaya (Perseroda).
Menetapkan apakah suatu informasi publik: Determining whether public information can be accessed or excluded through a Consequence Test together with the PPID Superior.
Menolak permohonan Informasi Publik seca: Refusing a Public Information request in writing if it falls under the excluded category, providing the reason for refusal and an explanation of the applicant's rights and objection procedures.
Menghadiri rapat koordinasi atau pembaha: Attending coordination meetings or discussions related to PPID at the DKI Jakarta Provincial level.
Melakukan koordinasi dengan perangkat PP: Coordinating with PPID staff and/or relevant units in handling information requests and resolving objections.
Melakukan pembaruan dan penyediaan infor: Updating and providing the latest public information through the official portal of PT Food Station Tjipinang Jaya (Perseroda) and/or the PPID Information System.
Melaporkan setiap ketidaksesuaian dalam: Reporting any discrepancies in the public information dispute process to the Information Commission Secretariat with the approval of the PPID Superior.
Melaksanakan sosialisasi dan edukasi int: Conducting internal outreach and education to improve understanding of public information disclosure within the company.
Struktur PPID FSTJ dipimpin oleh seorang: The PPID FSTJ structure is led by a PPID Superior (President Director) who delegates duties to the Main Information and Documentation Management Officer (PPID). The Main PPID is assisted by Executing PPID staff who serve information requests. Technical Staff from various work units ensure documents are available and up to date.
Menjadi penyedia informasi publik terbai: To be the best public information provider in the food sector, ensuring corporate transparency and accountability for the public interest.
Menyediakan layanan informasi yang cepat: Providing information services that are fast, easily accessible, and accurate.
Membangun sistem dokumentasi yang modern: Building a modern and integrated documentation system.
Meningkatkan kompetensi SDM PPID agar pr: Improving the competence of PPID human resources to be professional in service.
Informasi yang wajib diumumkan secara ru: Information that must be announced routinely and regularly, at least once every 6 (six) months.
Informasi yang wajib diumumkan tanpa pen: Information that must be announced without delay and available immediately once known, as it concerns public welfare and/or public order.
Informasi yang dapat diakses oleh pemoho: Information that can be accessed by public information applicants at any time, either directly or indirectly.
PROFIL DEWAN KOMISARIS & DIREKSI: PROFILE OF THE BOARD OF COMMISSIONERS & DIRECTORS
Daftar peraturan internal perusahaan dan: A list of internal company regulations and related laws that guide the implementation of Public Information Disclosure (KIP) at PPID PT Food Station Tjipinang Jaya.

Keputusan Direksi tentang Standar Pelaya: Board of Directors Decree on Public Information Service Standards
Undang-Undang Nomor 14 Tahun 2008 tentan: Law Number 14 of 2008 on Public Information Disclosure (KIP)
Peraturan Komisi Informasi Nomor 1 Tahun: Information Commission Regulation Number 1 of 2021 on Public Information Service Standards
Dengan ini, Pejabat Pengelola Informasi: Hereby, the Information and Documentation Management Officer (PPID) of PT Food Station Tjipinang Jaya declares our commitment to deliver public information services in accordance with the established standards.
Kami berkomitmen memberikan pelayanan in: We are committed to providing public information services that are fast, easy, and transparent.
Kami akan menanggapi permohonan informas: We will respond to public information requests within the timeframe set by the KIP Law.
Kami siap menerima dan memproses keberat: We are ready to receive and process objections to refusals or dissatisfaction with information services.
Kami menjamin kerahasiaan identitas Pemo: We guarantee the confidentiality of the applicant's identity unless required by law.
Apabila kami tidak menepati janji ini, k: Should we fail to keep this promise, we are ready to accept sanctions in accordance with applicable laws and regulations.
Langkah-langkah yang harus dilalui pemoh: The steps an applicant must follow to obtain public information from PPID PT Food Station Tjipinang Jaya.
Pemohon mengisi Formulir Permohonan Info: The applicant completes the Information Request Form in full (online/in person).
Pemohon menyerahkan salinan identitas di: The applicant submits a copy of their ID (KTP/SIM/Passport) or Deed of Establishment for institutions.
Petugas mencatat permohonan dan memberik: The officer records the request and issues a Receipt of Acknowledgment.
PPID memproses permintaan dan memberikan: PPID processes the request and provides written notice within 10 working days (extendable by 7 working days).
Pemohon mengambil atau menerima informas: The applicant collects or receives the public information in the requested format after paying any fees (if applicable).
Informasi mengenai jam operasional dan p: Information about operating hours and the channels an applicant can use to access PPID services.

Langsung: Datang ke meja layanan PPID pa: In person: Visit the PPID service desk during operating hours.

Permohonan di luar jam kerja akan dipros: Requests outside working hours will be processed on the next working day.
